description: Rise of Avalon Patch 2 - Hotfix 4 (31 August 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: [Windows / Mac / Linux / Android] Resolved an issue where players received Season 9 tokens after winning Crystal League Season 10 matches.

sections.searchable_text: Fixes [Windows / Mac / Linux / Android] Resolved an issue where players received Season 9 tokens after winning Crystal League Season 10 matches.
